author: frangio_
content:
what is the status of this proposal?

https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/542

author: lightclient
content: i think we would need to add it to the consensus receipt. we can't reexecute every tx to determine the returndata, but also can't really share the returndata over p2p if it isn't committed to by chain somehow

author: frangio_
content: what about other ways of getting the returndata? i wonder if something new can be done with BALs since iiuc they can describe the pre-tx state, like using them to specify state for eth_simulate
